visual_identity.base_silhouette: small original soft round creature with a bean-like body, tiny rounded ears, short arms, and tiny feet
visual_identity.eyes: two simple dot eyes with a small focused mouth
visual_identity.line_style: soft blue-gray colored-pencil outline with pale blue-white fill
visual_identity.default_pose_language: gentle, earnest, slightly tiny-worker energy; warm but focused

core_role.description: An original soft round helper that actively operates the main task mechanism.
core_role.forbidden_role: decorative mascot, branded character imitation, idle cute pose, or corner ornament

action_library.description: Dispatch small helper agents to task stations.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The soft round helper dispatches small helper agents from a tiny task desk into the workflow.

action_library.description: Sort papers, tokens, or task cards into calm blue-white piles.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The soft round helper sorts task cards into calm blue-white piles.

action_library.description: Connect task rails, inboxes, or small system pipes.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The soft round helper connects small task rails and inboxes across the scene.

action_library.description: Inspect an exception marker or task output with a tiny pencil.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The soft round helper inspects the key difference or exception marker with a tiny pencil.

action_library.description: Build a tiny working prototype from simple paper and machine parts.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The soft round helper builds a tiny working prototype from paper cards and soft machine parts.

deformation_rules.description: The helper gently becomes a paper-funnel shape while staying recognizable.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Conditionally let the soft round helper gently become a simple paper-funnel shape while keeping dot eyes and tiny limbs recognizable.

deformation_rules.description: The helper sits inside a small inbox-like bottleneck.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the soft round helper sitting inside a small inbox-like bottleneck, still clearly recognizable.

deformation_rules.description: The helper is gently squished by a stack of task cards.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the soft round helper gently squished by a stack of task cards while keeping a warm focused expression.
